overall.description: Third-person exploration of an ancient Greek sanctuary in a video game (Assassin's Creed Odyssey), featuring a prominent golden horse statue, classical stone architecture, purple festive banners, and mountain vistas. The camera ascends stone stairs, circles the statue, and explores the open courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with classical horse statue

events.description: ascending the wide stone stairs to the upper terrace
reaching the terrace level and beginning to circle the golden horse statue

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and circling around the golden horse statue to observe it from different angles

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps leading up to the sanctuary terrace
large black stone planter with blooming purple and white flowers
gleaming life-sized golden statue of a horse on a rectangular stone pedestal
light-colored stone retaining wall with steps
tall dark green trees framing the terrace

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of stone stairs leading to an elevated terrace. The camera ascends and circles a magnificent golden horse statue standing on a stone pedestal, surrounded by large decorative urns with flowers and cypress trees. The scene is enclosed by stone walls with dappled sunlight filtering through the foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sanctuary courtyard with classical columns and mountain backdrop

events.description: moving past the horse statue into the open courtyard with banner-strung columns
turning left to face the inner temple building

agents.ego_description: walking through the sanctuary courtyard, observing the classical architecture, festive banners, and distant mountain scenery

entered.detail: tall classical columns with red and gold capitals
strings of purple triangular flags suspended between wooden poles
rocky mountain peaks under clear blue sky
intricately carved stone balustrade with geometric patterns
bronze fire bowls with flames burning on the terrace edge
classical Greek temple with pediment and columns
tall stone pillar topped with a golden eagle sculpture

segments.scene_description: Moving past the golden horse statue, the scene opens into a wide sanctuary courtyard lined with classical columns and strung with purple festive banners. The camera continues forward revealing a decorative stone railing, burning braziers, and a stunning mountain backdrop. Towards the end, the camera turns left to reveal a temple building with an eagle statue perched on a pillar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a secluded terrace into a wide, festive sanctuary courtyard. It begins at the base of stone stairs, climbing upward to circle a magnificent golden horse statue surrounded by decorative urns and cypress trees under dappled sunlight. As the camera moves past the statue, the enclosed space opens into a sprawling courtyard lined with classical columns and vibrant purple festive banners. The view then expands to reveal burning braziers and a decorative stone railing set against a stunning mountain backdrop before finally turning left toward a temple building featuring an eagle statue perched on a pillar.
